controls.productionRequirement: Hosted identity, role mapping, session expiry, MFA for administrators and auditable evaluator access.
Managed database, encrypted backups, retention jobs, restore drills and deletion workflow.
Signed report URLs, access logs, report expiry and managed rendering workers.
Centralized immutable logs, alerting, log retention and incident correlation.
Human assistive-technology audit signoff and regression plan for every release.
Named release owner, signoff checklist, rollback criteria and change freeze rules.
Completed standard setting, pilot calibration and public score-claim boundaries.
CI-enforced no-secret, no-unexpected-email and no-remote-script checks.

productionBlockers: managed durable storage with backups and retention
production proctoring policy and appeal workflow
limitations: The current operations package supports controlled beta planning, not production hosting.
Production still requires managed infrastructure, live monitoring, legal review and support ownership.
